title: Partners in Crime
writer: Grover Jones, Gilbert Pratt, George Marion Jr.
actors: Wallace Beery, Raymond Hatton, Mary Brian
plot: A big-city is over-run with crime as two gangs fight over turf after one gang invades the territory of the other. Mike Doolan, an amateur private detective, and "Scoops" McGee, a wise-cracking newspaper reporter take both on in a ...
